textByHashes.b47e90465138922b7e7656536b4596b71cf8fd89: Sir? I thought I'd left that behind when I retired. Please, call me Cozyac.
textByHashes.cf1ef9c9004a20ba5460f91f662cd14ac7403a73: I seem to remember one of the rules of this party was that the staff were to remain anonymous.
textByHashes.ccd2a1963c9c7705341f08ab55aec88738f7637f: I am, yes. Though I am far more excited for tonight's performance. Constantinius says he's hired some of the finest actors for this one!
textByHashes.5af5041f8456226879e1174603d6403b1bd299f1: Absolutely! Though I'm starting to feel myself in need of another drink. I don't suppose you could sort that when you have a moment?
textByHashes.bfda2da6601d7c087d84e5e6c73164182bfbc643: I'm familiar with his work, but not the man himself. He's been Constantinius' preferred actor for a few years now.
textByHashes.4a82821ae7038114b11506375493c4f7f252f701: I'm almost certain we didn't. The actors spend the entire party getting ready, and then I usually fall asleep by the end of the play!
textByHashes.57bd14b8b0c72811ba5377a534c4dfd5caee55e1: I'm an older man. I need a good early night to keep myself going. I am partial to a puzzle though, so solving this crime could keep me up all night!
textByHashes.3fbbf001b3cbe2c6f0e8fc6f1b64406283a0954c: I did, and I shall stand by that claim! Why are you the one making these accusations anyway? You were the one down there with him! Besides, you're just a butler!
textByHashes.321a9368207da94d5ddd6b50299344c7df3d5feb: Not one I would have killed him over! He owed me some money and wasn't paying up. I just needed to put some pressure on him.
textByHashes.78816b969c97ccd1248f4814f0cd01489021fada: Why? Why kill someone over a debt? A dead man can't repay me, so I'd have needed to actually reclaim the money before killing him, at which point I'd have no reason to kill him anyway!
textByHashes.697f5f48070151984ce8d5763020b0ca3ae4e370: Haven't you already tried to accuse me?
textByHashes.a91726a4f33467270ef03cdc860d38944f8f74af: I'm not sure about this new character. Are they even in costume?
